expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, section “4a.1 Case focus coverage (planned, evidence-required)” explicitly restates the focus: “modern grid banding scenarios that distinguish: 1) Styling variants 2) Interactions 3) Backward-compatible rendering outcomes” and then breaks it down into “A) Banding styling variants”, “B) Interaction-sensitive outcomes”, and “C) Backward-compatible rendering outcomes”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase under test: phase4a” and is structured as “Phase 4a — Evidence-Gated Cross-Feature Checks (Advisory)”, including “4a.0 Evidence availability gate” and “4a.1 Case focus coverage”, concluding with “Phase 4a Deliverable Status”.
